basic_details.job_title: VOCPA Assistant Director Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline
basic_details.short_information: V.O.Chidambaranar Port Authority (VOCPA) Assistant Director Notification 2026 has been released on 07 May 2026 on the official website vocport.gov.in . A total of 1 vacancy has been announced through the VOCPA Assistant Director Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 35 years. Upper Age Limit is relaxable in deserving cases.

qualification.education_qualification: Post Graduate degree in Engineering / Management from reputed foreign University or Graduates from IITs
qualification.details: Post Graduate degree in Engineering / Management from a reputed foreign University or Graduates from IITs.

selection_process: Shortlisting based on marks scored in qualifying examination Interview (40% Technical Knowledge
how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for VOCPA Assistant Director Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: www.vocport.gov.in.
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 27-05-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the VOCPA Assistant Director (Project) recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the offline application form for the VOCPA Assistant Director (Project) recruitment is 27th May 2026. Candidates are advised to submit their applications well in advance to avoid any last-minute issues.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Assistant Director (Project) post?
faq.answer: To be eligible for the Assistant Director (Project) position, candidates must possess a Post Graduate degree in Engineering or Management from a reputed foreign University, or be Graduates from IITs.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for candidates applying for the Assistant Director (Project) post is 35 years. Age relaxation may be provided in deserving cases as per the organization's policy.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Assistant Director (Project) position?
faq.answer: Selected candidates for the Assistant Director (Project) post will receive a consolidated salary of Rs. 1,40,000/- per month. This is a contractual position.

faq.question: Q5. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this VOCPA Assistant Director (Project) recruitment. Candidates can apply without paying any fee.

faq.question: Q6. How will candidates be selected for the Assistant Director (Project) post?
faq.answer: The selection process involves shortlisting candidates based on their marks in the qualifying examination, followed by an interview. Document verification will also be conducted.

faq.question: Q7. What is the nature of the job?
faq.answer: The job for the Assistant Director (Project) post is on a contractual basis. This means the employment will be for a fixed tenure as per the terms and conditions of VOCPA.

faq.question: Q8. Where is the V.O.Chidambaranar Port Authority located?
faq.answer: V.O.Chidambaranar Port Authority is located in Tuticorin, Tamil Nadu, with the pincode 628004. The recruitment is for positions within this port authority.

faq.question: Q9. Can candidates from outside Tamil Nadu apply?
faq.answer: The notification does not specify any domicile restrictions. Therefore, candidates from any part of India who meet the eligibility criteria are likely eligible to apply for this recruitment.

faq.question: Q10. What documents should be attached with the application form?
faq.answer: Candidates should attach self-attested copies of required documents such as their photograph, signature, ID proof, and relevant educational and experience certificates as specified in the official notification.
